# saas_iam corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Okta ===
# expect: Okta API Token (SSWS)
Authorization: SSWS 00QCjAl4MlV-WPXM00000000HmjFx-vbGua00000

# === Auth0 ===
# expect: Auth0 Management API Token
token eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9.eyJ0audGVzdDEyMzQ1.c2lnbmF0dXJlMDAw here

# === Duo Security ===
# expect: Duo Security Integration Key
# expect: Duo Security API Hostname
ikey DIWJ8X6AEYOR5OMC6TQ1 paired
host api-1a2b3c4d.duosecurity.com here

# === 1Password ===
# expect: 1Password Service Account Token
# expect: 1Password Secret Reference URI
token ops_eyJhbGci.cGF5bG9hZA.c2lnbmF0dXJl here
ref op://Production/Stripe/credential here

# === Bitwarden ===
# expect: Bitwarden Secrets Manager Access Token
token 0.fbf17ab1-90c0-4f88-9e2f-1234567890ab.SGI1eHl6QUJDREVGMTIzNDU2:UVdFcnR5dWlvcEFTREYxMjM0 here

# === Microsoft Entra ID ===
# expect: Microsoft Entra ID Refresh Token
refresh 0.AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here

# === SAML ===
# expect: SAML Certificate (PEM)
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
MIIDXjCCAkagAwIBAgIEXAMPLEcert0000000000000000000000000000
-----END CERTIFICATE-----

# === Salesforce ===
# expect: Salesforce Session ID
# expect: Salesforce Refresh Token
sid 00D5g000004Wabcd!ARQAQHexampleSessionBodyValue00000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000 here
refresh 5Aep861dlMxAL.LhVTuPRaExampleRefreshTokenValue00000 here

# === Stytch / Ory / Ramp / Hex / Prefect (Block 3b) ===
# expect: Stytch Secret
# expect: Stytch Project ID
# expect: Ory API Key
# expect: Ramp API Credential
# expect: Hex API Token
# expect: Prefect API Key
secret-test-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
project-live-abcdef01-abcd-abcd-abcd-abcdef012345
ory_pat_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
ramp_sec_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
hxtp_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
pnu_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
